feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: You and me, we've got (browser) history
entry.summary:
Author: liviapeleia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,637Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 244

Summary: A season 1 canon divergent AU told through Reddit posts. Gaius and Uther are having a secret love affair. Somehow, Geoffrey might be involved. Arthur has more throwaway accounts than brain cells, Morgana is an SJW (affectionate), Gwen is the only sane person, and Merlin is absolutely not in love, no way, never. And how the hell does Kilgharrah's cave have WiFi?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Within Four Walls
entry.summary:
Author: Oakfiddle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,095Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 58

Summary: Love is like wildflowers. You can often find them in the most unexpected of places. ~***~Merlin and his mum wans to move away from Ealdor to get a fresh start, to leave his mum's abusive ex-boyfriend behind.They go to Camelot to look at a flat. His mum falls in love with the flat, and Merlin falls in love with the property manager, who also happens be the landlord's son.Why can't life be simple for once?

entry.title: Don’t Follow Me (I Can’t Bear to Look)
entry.summary:
Author: Gwenifara_Fae

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,444Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 38

Summary: Arthur asks Gwen to marry him and Merlin decides he can’t bear to watch his best friend marry the love of his life and leaves.After reading Merlin’s note, Arthur mistakenly believes Merlin is in love with Gwen and must decide between chasing after the best friend he’s ever had, and potentially loosing his fiancé.Morgana’s snide comments are helping no one. Gwaine won’t leave Merlin alone.

entry.title: A FAKE DESTINY REVERSAL
entry.summary:
Author: OfTintagel

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,636Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 15

Summary: When Morgana gets deceived to think Mordred is Emrys and Merlin is Arthur’s Bane, it gives Merlin opportunities he could only dream of. Or, Merlin pretends to be on Morgana’s side, pratically becomes a spy and they plot against poor Mordred together.

entry.title: Blind Loyalty
entry.summary:
Author: Shippeoforever

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,906Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 26

Summary: The laws of Camelot are clear: no animal that does not serve for hunting may cross the castle walls. But when the new King Arthur discovers that his closest advisor has defied the rules for a small, snow-white, blind puppy, the destiny of Albion takes an unexpected turn. Amidst secrets shared with the most loyal knights, Morgana's cunning, and the warmth of a love that defies royal decrees, a new law is about to be written... one dictated by the heart.   Note:** Story created with the help of AI, but all ideas are my own. Tags will be added as the story progresses. I should mention that English isn't my first language, so I apologize if there are any spelling mistakes throughout the fanfic. The chapters will be short, I'm warning you now, but that doesn't make it any less of an important story.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Some and Now None of You
entry.summary:
Author: Isthisusernameavailableornot

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 212,508Chapters: 66/67Kudos: 2,176

Summary: "Let him think I hate him. If that’ll stop him from risking his neck for me over and over again, then it’s a sacrifice I don’t have to think twice about." — Arthur finds out Merlin has magic. He also finds out how often Merlin risked his life for him and so, he does the only thing he can think of to protect him: banishment. Hurt and angry, Merlin leaves and swears to not look back. But, when two years pass and Morgana shows up at Merlin’s door, urging him to fill Gaius’ position as Court Physician, Merlin agrees. He really doesn’t know why, but Arthur is sure Merlin would do just about anything to get on his nerves. Unprepared for the shock of seeing Merlin back in the castle, Arthur is forced to speed along his plans to lift the ban on magic. But between stubborn councilors, a mysterious plague, a still angry Merlin, and Morgana being Morgana, Arthur is fairly certain he’ll lose his mind before the first year of his reign even ends.

  • Rape/Non-Con

entry.title: Forever Is My Tomorrow
entry.summary:
Author: Mahogany_Rust

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 460,316Chapters: 48/80Kudos: 1,632

Summary: It had actually been a long time since Hiccup had thought about how he would die.When he was young, every sunrise was another gamble to see if he would get himself eaten by a dragon or somehow manage to fall off one of Berk’s many cliffs.Perhaps Winter would finally choose to break his wiry body with illness or he would catch an unfortunate stray battle axe.Yet here he was, 21, about to die in the wrong place (not a bad age to reach in the Archipelago when you’re Hiccup Haddock, let's be honest). But that was the thing wasn’t it? Hiccup made plenty of marks all in the wrong places. What if one of those marks was in the future? On one unsuspecting spirit’s affections?---- FIMT CINEMATIC TRAILER

entry.title: I hope you like the stars I stole for you
entry.summary:
Author: theplanetsalign

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,105Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Merlin AU! Wylan is hated by Camelot - more specifically the knights he’s supposed to lead, and his father. Life is the same benign repetitive pretence at being a knight until a mysterious figure catches the attentions of the knights, and especially Wylan. However, their first meeting goes less than well and Wylan soon wants the mysterious magician dead just as the other knights do. He just also happens to think he’s very attractive too.

entry.title: [Podfic] There Are No Gays in Football
entry.summary:
Author: AnneException

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,026Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 21

Summary: When a deeply-closeted Arthur Pendragon finally earns a spot in Camelot's first XI, he's dead set on breaking records, not one of sport's last taboos. But life, like football, is a funny old game, and sometimes the only way up is out. Especially once he realises he's arse over tit for the new physio.A queer Arthurian tale of courage, love, and football.

entry.title: In the darkness and the light
entry.summary:
Author: Katiebabyangel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,252Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 48

Summary: As winter hit in earnest, Merlin started to fade away before Arthur's eyes. Arthur took advice from Gwen to figure out why his manservant regularly seemed to lose himself to something they couldn't see. Leaving the episode to play out resulted in Merlin admitting to a fear that Arthur hadn't realized he had, as if Arthur would ever let anything hurt his best friend. He would kill anyone who tried — he just needed to make sure Merlin knew that too.Based on the prompt: "Please... I'm so tired." "Then sleep. I'll stand guard." "I thought you said it was safe here?" "It is. But you don't feel safe, do you?" "...not yet." "Then I'll stand guard until you do."

entry.title: For Good
entry.summary:
Author: elevenincamelot

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 97,611Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 241

Summary: Fifteen hundred years. I’m sure it’s been fifteen hundred years because I’ve felt every single moment of it. Every draw of breath, every step on the hard ground, every ounce of stark reality has been obvious to me. I’m not the same as I was. Time has a way of digging deep into your spirit and settling its claws there. And I will wait. I have no choice, but I keep telling myself that wouldn’t matter. It might not matter. Would he even know me? Behind this familiar face is a creature who has lived the lives of hundreds of tortured souls. Does it show? Could he see the desperation there? If I made him look, really look...If he were here, I like to think I could be who I once was. Could feel the release of the claws of time like a weight coming off my chest. I like to think that weight would be erased. That I would be whole again. Have I only changed for the interim? Could that shroud be lifted for good?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,155,815Chapters: 139/?Kudos: 1,728

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 64,258Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 75

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Deceptions
entry.summary:
Author: confused_moron

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 220,118Chapters: 36/?Kudos: 4,183

Summary: During the train journey following his third year, Harry's entire bloody world was turned upside-down. Overwhelmed by some sudden realisations and his bizarre escape from the future, he discovered that those he had believed to be his most loyal allies were the ones poised to inflict the deepest wounds. However, those he had never deemed trustworthy turned out to be the people who would be standing by his side amidst the war. And Harry finally found himself making profound decisions that would forever alter the course of his life...Includes Dark but not evil Harry, some characters Bashing and mental trauma.  "Ohh sssweet Lady, I, the queen of hell, am sssstuck with an innocent child-" the snake exclaimed, causing Harry to pout as he squirmed in the blonde's lap to find a more comfortable position.   "Hey! Not fair! Wait- queen? "   "Yesss hatchling, I am Manassha the queen of hell ssserpentsss, and you sssweet little hatchling, are my counter-"

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 394,196Chapters: 83/110Kudos: 3,704

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 153,564Chapters: 39/?Kudos: 147

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?
